frontmatter.title: My Goals Report - December 2021

pageProps.content:
### Quantify my life

The monthly post where I update you about my goals and how they're going.
TABLE OF CONTENTS
Health
💪 Get six pack abs
🧘‍♀️ Fix my posture
👅 Get more hench
👽 Live longer and healthier
Happiness
✍️ Do more journaling
🥰 Be more grateful
Major Projects
📖 Write a Really Good Book
Medicine
🏥 Work part-time in A&E
🧠 Become a Medical Educator
🪣 The Medicine Bucket List
Learning Cool Stuff
🎨 Become a Concept Artist
🧞‍♂️ Join the Magic Circle
🎤 Learn to Freestyle Rap ✅
👩‍🎤 Busk on the London Underground
Life + Relationships
💕 Take Dating more seriously
💌 Make more of an effort to stay in touch with friends
Business Stuff
Overall Plan for the Month
Here's a link to last month's goal report that had more details about each of these.
